name: EuiHorizontalRule
description: Visual divider line. Use instead of raw <hr>.
visualDescription: A thin horizontal line (1px) spanning the full width of its container (or quarter / half width via the size prop). Provides visual separation between sections. Has consistent top and bottom margin (vertical whitespace). NOT EuiSpacer (EuiSpacer is invisible whitespace; EuiHorizontalRule is a visible line).

size.description: Defines the width of the HR.
